data.content: Plan v4 resolves both prior review gaps: (1) RelationshipPicker in lightbox â€” extends selectedIds to selectedItems:{id,alias?,readOnly?} so persisted deps show as read-only badges (no X button), avoiding the missing DELETE endpoint issue; newly-staged deps remain removable. (2) cascade-close-dialog â€” extends CascadeDescendant with alias field; getOpenDescendants() already fetches full Beat objects so alias pipes through once Beat has the field. Also retains the waves dep filter fix (dep.dependency_typeâ†’dep.type) and full alias pipeline: KnotRecordâ†’Beatâ†’WaveBeatâ†’BeatDependencyâ†’CascadeDescendant type additions, toBeat() mapping, listDependencies() enrichment, 8 view components updated. ~15 files, medium complexity.
